heading: Number Search and Sort
body:
The following query shows how to sort the results by a numeric field.
It uses the [range](range-ref) operator to search for movies that have
won 10 or more awards and then sorts the results by the numeric field
value in descending order.

The query uses the following pipeline stages:

- [$search](pipe.$search) stage to search the `awards.wins` field and
  sort the results in descending order.

- [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) stage to limit the output to `5` results.

- [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage to exclude all fields except `title`
  and `awards.wins`.
